docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEU, ALDA AS TO DEFENDANT TECHNER, DANIELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-17-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TECHNER, DANIELLE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFOREJUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY LEU, ALDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S MOTHER PATRICIA CROSS PRESENT IN COURT TODAY AND STATES THAT DEFENDANT NOW RESIDES IN HAWAII AND WILL NOT BE RETURNING FOR APPROX. 2 YEARS. DEFENDANT'S MOTHER ALSO STATES THAT THE MINOR WAS A MINOR AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT AND HER INSURANCE CARRIER ADVISED THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT NEED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT DUE TO THE FACT THAT DEFENDANT WAS SERVED AND NOT PRESENT IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEU, ALDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TECHNER, DANIELLE $5,385.36 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,460.36, DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT, BUT HER INSURANCE COMPANY PROVIDED DOCUMENTS WHICH I RECEIVED. PLAINTIFF CONTINUES TO SUFFER FROM A HEADACHE AND THEREFORE HAS A MULTIPLIER OF THE ORIGINAL MEDICAL COSTS OF $2692.68 BY TWO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TECHNER, DANIELLE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
